S.FORM: Mike Bibby 5 bulad 13 demiad, 1978 a mihca, Mike Bibby, miunduay.
S.PHON: mikə bibbj * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, mikə bibbj, miunduaj.
